attacking_style: Not a natural attacker; responds to adversity with sustained efforts rather than explosive accelerations. Strongest in chase scenarios on gravel/irregular terrain where power endurance matters more than punchy changes of pace.
team_tactics: Teams have shown reluctance to fully commit domestiques to his efforts (Strade Bianche hesitation, Giro GC gamble). Often left to defend or chase alone after initial positioning work.
terrain_preference: Flat roads and sustained power terrain suit best. Gravel sectors where consistency matters over explosivity. Exposed badly on steep, irregular gradients requiring repeated accelerations.
vulnerability: Lacks explosive power on steep irregular climbs. Crashes disrupt his rhythm significantly. When teams prioritize stage hunting over protecting his position, he's left isolated at critical moments.
key_patterns: Strong on flat/sustained gravel but struggles on steep irregular gradients (Giro climb loss vs Strade chase)
Teams hesitate committing full support, leaving him isolated in key moments (2 instances observed)
Shows resilience after setbacks: post-crash pursuit at Strade reduced 7s gap alone
Power-endurance rider not explosive climber: survived flat pink defense, cracked on punchy terrain
form_trajectory: positive: Despite 2021 Giro struggles, 2023 Strade showed improved gravel strength and mental resilience, closing gaps solo post-crash
